Source: https://docs.slack.dev/reference/block-kit/blocks/divider-block

# Divider block

## Fields {#fields}

Field

Type

Description

Required?

`type`

String

The type of block. For a divider block, `type` is always `divider`.

Required

`block_id`

String

A unique identifier for a block. If not specified, one will be generated. Maximum length for this field is 255 characters. `block_id` should be unique for each message and each iteration of a message. If a message is updated, use a new `block_id`.

Optional

## Usage Info {#usage-info}

A content divider, like an `<hr>`, to split up different blocks inside of a message. The divider block is nice and neat, requiring only a `type`.

## Examples {#example}

![An example of a divider block](data:image/png;base64,)

* JSON
* Python SDK
* Node SDK
* Java SDK

```json
{    "blocks": [        {            "type": "divider"        }    ]}
```text

[View in Block Kit Builder](https://app.slack.com/block-kit-builder/#%7B%22blocks%22:%5B%7B%22type%22:%22divider%22,%22block_id%22:%22divider1%22%7D%5D%7D)
